Who We Are

Your trusted document partner

We help professionals, students, and organisations present their best selves through strategically crafted documents.

Zuhzah Consulting is a professional document services firm — online-based with over three years of experience helping individuals and organisations across the globe. We serve job seekers, students, academics, NGOs, startups, and established businesses.

Our team of seasoned consultants combines deep industry knowledge with exceptional writing skills to deliver documents that are not only polished and professional, but strategically tailored to achieve results.

★ Excellence
★ Integrity
★ Client Focus
★ Timeliness
★ Confidentiality

Our Mission

To empower professionals, students, and organisations across Africa and beyond with high-quality, results-driven documents that open doors, advance careers, and secure opportunities.

Our Vision

To be the most trusted professional document services partner on the African continent and a recognised name globally.

Why Choose Us

We don't produce generic documents. Every piece is tailored to your specific goals, industry, and voice — because your story deserves to be told right.

What We Offer

Comprehensive document services

Discuss Your Needs
📄

CV / Resume Writing

Modern, ATS-optimised CVs tailored to your target role and industry with compelling professional summaries and strategic keyword placement.

✉️

Cover Letters

Personalised, engaging cover letters that complement your CV, speak to the employer's needs, and articulate why you are the right candidate.

🎓

Statement of Purpose

Compelling narratives for university, postgraduate, and scholarship applications that resonate with admissions committees and scholarship panels.

💡

Motivation Letters

Authentic, persuasive letters for fellowships, internships, competitive programmes, and awards that showcase your passion and unique fit.

📊

Proposals

Structured, professional proposals that clearly communicate your objectives, methodology, budget, and expected outcomes to clients and investors.

🏆

Grant Writing

End-to-end grant application support for NGOs, startups, and researchers — needs assessments, project narratives, budget justifications, and impact statements.

🏢

Company Profile Design

Professional company profiles that communicate your brand identity, mission, services, team, and achievements in a clear and visually organised format.

🔗

LinkedIn Optimisation

Full profile rewrite — headline, summary, experience, skills, and recommendations strategy — with keyword optimisation to attract recruiters and opportunities.

🌐

Web Design

Professional, mobile-friendly websites tailored to your brand — for individuals, businesses, NGOs, and startups. Clean, modern designs that make a lasting first impression online.

By Our Founder

Winds and Whispers

A raw, honest autobiography now available in hard copy and as an eBook.

Now Available

Winds and Whispers

By Frank Okemwa  ·  My 36-Year Story of Overcoming Self-Doubt

If you have ever felt like a fraud in the very room you worked hardest to enter, this book was written for you. Winds and Whispers is a medical scientist's unflinching account of thirty-six years of impostor syndrome — named, faced, and ultimately defeated through service, integrity, and the stubborn grace of faith. Frank Okemwa's story is for every professional who has doubted their own name on their own certificate.

Policies

Our Terms & Privacy

Orders are confirmed upon receipt of payment or a confirmed payment arrangement. We accept mobile money (M-Pesa), bank transfer, and PayPal. Prices are as listed in our service packages.
Standard delivery is 2 business days from order confirmation. Express (48 hrs) and urgent (24 hrs) delivery are available for applicable packages. Timelines begin once all required client information has been received.
Revision requests must be submitted within 3 days of document delivery. Revisions are based on the original brief; significant scope changes may incur additional charges. Refunds are considered on a case-by-case basis if the delivered document does not meet the agreed brief after all revision rounds have been exhausted. Refunds are not issued for change of mind after work has commenced.
All personal information and documents shared with Zuhzah Consulting are treated with strict confidentiality. We do not sell, share, or disclose your information to third parties except as required by law. Documents and personal data are stored securely and deleted upon your request. You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal information at any time.
All documents produced by Zuhzah Consulting become the property of the client upon full payment. These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Kenya. Any disputes shall be resolved through mutual negotiation or, where necessary, through the appropriate Kenyan legal channels.
